calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Petitioner Shanya Arnetta-Jewel Bivens was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Nicole Arnetta-Jewel Bivens.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
